parameters.subject: =🗓️ Daily Sales Summary – {{ $now.format('YYYY-MM-DD') }}
parameters.message:
=

📊 Daily Sales Report - {{ $now.format('MMMM Do, YYYY') }}

Here is the summary of today's confirmed sale orders:

{{ $json.orders.map(order => `

🧾 Order ID: ${order.saleOrderId}

  • Customer: ${order.customer}
  • Date: ${order.createdOn}
  • Invoice Address: ${order.invoiceAddress}
  • Payment Terms: ${order.paymentTerms}
  • Payment Mode: ${order.paymentMode}
  • Products:
      ${order.products.map(p => `
    • ${p}
      • `).join('')}
  • Subtotal: ${order.exTaxTotal} ${order.currency}
  • Tax: ${order.taxTotal} ${order.currency}
  • Total: ${order.inTaxTotal} ${order.currency}
`).join('') }}

📦 Total Sales Summary

  • Number of Orders: {{ $json.orders.length }}
  • Total Revenue (Excl. Tax): {{ $json.orders.reduce((sum, o) => sum + Number(o.exTaxTotal), 0).toFixed(2) }} Euro
  • Total Revenue (Incl. Tax): {{ $json.orders.reduce((sum, o) => sum + Number(o.inTaxTotal), 0).toFixed(2) }} Euro

Keep up the great work! 🚀
